tool_args.label: MNR Diversity and Equal Opportunity 3rd Quarter Progress Report

payload.title: Metro-North Railroad (MNR) Diversity and Equal Opportunity 3 rd Quarter Progress Report

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MNR Total Workforce as of September 30, 2024

payload.raw_value_text: 2% (99) self-identified as a persons with a disability.
A net increase of 8 self-identified female
A net decrease of 10 self identified veteran

tool_args.label: MNR Net Decrease of Employees with Disabilities

payload.raw_value_text: A net decrease of 5 self identified individuals with a disability

tool_args.label: Title VI and Related Discrimination Complaints

payload.claim_text: 37 Title VI and Related** complaints were filed citing 37 separate bases
payload.subject: Title VI and Related Discrimination Complaints
payload.description: The most frequently cited basis was Race. There were 0 Title VI complaints filed with external agencies and 0 Title VI Lawsuits filed.

payload.claim_text: 75 complaints were filed citing 83 separate bases
payload.subject: Employment Discrimination Complaints
payload.description: The most frequent singularly-cited basis was Race/Color. There were 2 lawsuits filed.

tool_args.label: B.E.G.I.N. Panel - Advancing Black Excellence in the Workplace

payload.description: B.E.G.I.N. held a panel discussion centered on Advancing Black Excellence in the Workplace. Several MTA executives from operations and headquarters took part.

tool_args.label: EWT Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk

payload.description: Empowering Women in Transportation (EWT) led the MTA's participation in the Making Strides for Breast Cancer Walk. Goal was to raise $30,000 and raised over $40,000.

tool_args.label: All Generational Winter Coat & Toy Drive

payload.description: All Generational hosted their annual winter toy and coat drive to benefit The Henry Street Settlement. Collection boxes at all MTA Agencies.

tool_args.label: Veterans ERG Veterans Day Ceremony and Parade

payload.description: Veteran ERG held annual Veterans Day Ceremony. MTA Pipes and Drums and Color Guard participated. Veterans took part in NYC Veterans Day Parade.
Pride Express hosted a lunch and learn detailing the timeline of historical events that shaped LGBTQ+ rights in the workplace.
Young Professional (YP) members had the opportunity to meet employees from different agencies and crafts; to introduce themselves and describe their roles.
